name: 8 Fat Fat 8 Bar & Grille
tagline: A 40-year Honolulu institution where dive bar meets Chinese-fusion kitchen — pool, darts, karaoke, and the 'Fat Fat Special Chicken.'
mustOrder: Fat Fat Special Chicken — the legendary house dish, crispy and saucy
stir-fried lettuce — sounds weird, tastes incredible
fried rice — simple but perfectly executed late-night fuel
parking: Street parking on S Beretania St
talkStory: Established in 1986, 8 Fat Fat 8 is the rare dive bar where the food is genuinely great. The Chinese-fusion kitchen turns out dishes that would hold up at a proper restaurant — the Fat Fat Special Chicken and stir-fried lettuce are legendary among regulars. The crowd is a cross-section of real Honolulu: off-duty service industry workers, UH students, neighborhood uncles shooting pool, and whoever wandered in for karaoke. No craft cocktails, no Instagram decor, no tourists. Just cheap drinks, good food, and 40 years of accumulated character on S Beretania St.
